title: Warm Velvety Mediterranean Eggplant Wrap
description: A malty and velvety Mediterranean dish featuring chives and wrapped in a ssam-wrap, perfect for ovo-vegetarian diets. This show-off dish is sure to impress with its rich flavors and textures.
instructions: Preheat the oven to 400 degrees Fahrenheit.
Brush the eggplant slices with olive oil and season with salt and pepper.
Roast the eggplant in the oven for 20 minutes, or until tender and lightly browned.
In a small bowl, whisk together the malt syrup and garlic.
Brush the malt syrup mixture onto the roasted eggplant slices.
In a large skillet, warm the ssam-wraps over medium heat for 1-2 minutes on each side.
Assemble the wraps by spreading a quarter of the feta cheese onto each wrap, followed by a few slices of the roasted eggplant and a sprinkle of chopped chives.
Serve the wraps warm and enjoy.
